name: Undertale
description: UNDERTALE! The RPG game where you don't have to destroy anyone.
requirements:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, or 10
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: 128MB
  • Storage: 200 MB available space
comment1: I've slept on this game for too long, and now that I've finally beaten it, I must say this game was worth the hype.
comment2: Gonna resist the temptation to write a whole essay here because nobody's actually gonna read that anyways. If you like story-driven games you should play this.
comment3: This game has become a favorite for a lot of people, but for me, it is a source of inspiration. When I realize that this game was created by only one person, I am filled with determination
